# Lucid UI

> Shared React component library for Pandahrms frontend projects. Built with Tailwind CSS v4 (OKLCH color space) and Radix UI primitives. Distributed as the `@pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui` npm package on **GitHub Packages**.

## Installation

The package is published to **GitHub Packages**, not the public npm registry. Consumers need a project-level `.npmrc`:

```
@pandaworks-sw:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=${GITHUB_TOKEN}
```

тАжand a `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var (classic PAT with `read:packages` scope) on every machine and CI job that runs `pnpm install`.

```bash
pnpm add @pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui
```

Then import named components:

```tsx
import { Button, Badge, Modal, StatCard, MeterRow } from '@pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui';
```

Peer dependencies the consumer must already have: `react >=19`, `react-dom >=19`, `lucide-react >=0.500`, `react-hook-form >=7`, `tailwindcss >=4`. The package ships its own design-token stylesheet тАФ consumers wire it up in their entry CSS:

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui/styles.css";

@source "../node_modules/@pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui";
```

The `styles.css` import provides every token (`--primary`, `--brand`, `--success`, `--info`, `--warning`, `--muted`, etc.), the base layer, and the `text-display-*` / `text-mono-*` / `bg-pattern-*` utilities. The `@source` line lets Tailwind v4 scan the package's compiled JSX so class names used inside components survive tree-shaking. Fonts (Inter, Comfortaa, JetBrains Mono) must be loaded separately by the consumer.

Tree-shaking works out of the box because the package ships ESM with `sideEffects: false`.

### Customizing components

Customizations land upstream in the lucid-ui repo. Don't fork a single component locally тАФ open a PR against lucid-ui or wrap the component in a project-local component that lives outside of `@pandaworks-sw/lucid-ui`'s exports.

## Tech Stack

- React 19, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4 (OKLCH color space)
- Radix UI primitives
- class-variance-authority for variants
- Lucide icons

## Foundations

The design tokens and typography rules every component is built on. Showcased in the demo under the **Foundations** sidebar group (`/#/colors`, `/#/typography`, `/#/tones`).

### Color tokens

All tokens live in [packages/registry/src/styles.css](../packages/registry/src/styles.css). Use the semantic theme tokens by default тАФ they remap automatically across light and dark.

**Stone scale (cool neutrals)** тАФ `--stone-50` `#F7F9FB` тЖТ `--stone-950` `#080B0E` (50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900, 950). Tailwind utilities: `bg-stone-{50тАж950}`, `text-stone-*`, `border-stone-*`. Use directly only when you need a specific neutral step; for app surfaces prefer the semantic theme tokens.

**Panda blue (brand accent)** тАФ `--panda-50` `#E7F7FD` тЖТ `--panda-900` `#08323F` (50, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900). `--brand` and `--ring` resolve to `--panda-400` `#20B0E0`.

**Semantic chroma (non-text fills)** тАФ used for meter bars, status dots, chart fills, icon glyphs:
- `--success` `#4F8A52`
- `--info` `#3D7DD9`
- `--warning` `#C98A2B`
- `--danger` `#C8543F`
- `--destructive` aliases `--danger`

Each has a `--{name}-foreground: #FFFFFF` companion for solid-bg-+-white-text controls.

**WCAG AA pairings (text on tinted bg)** тАФ the chroma tokens cannot pass 4.5:1 against their own tints. For text on `bg-X/15` (light) and `bg-X/20` (dark), use:
- `--success-soft-fg` (light `#377336` / dark `#9FD0A2`) тАФ ~4.7:1 / ~7.4:1
- `--info-soft-fg` (light `#2964C4` / dark `#9FC2F0`) тАФ ~4.7:1 / ~7.2:1
- `--warning-soft-fg` (light `#955B0E` / dark `#F0C47A`) тАФ ~5.2:1 / ~7.2:1
- `--destructive-soft-fg` (light `#A23120` / dark `#F0A896`) тАФ ~5.5:1 / ~7.0:1
- `--destructive-aa: #A8392A` (same in both themes) тАФ solid red bg with white text, 6.3:1

**Adaptive theme tokens (shadcn-style)** тАФ these swap values between light and dark:
- `--background` (stone-50 / stone-800), `--foreground` (stone-800 / stone-150)
- `--card` (white / stone-700), `--popover` (white / stone-700)
- `--primary` (stone-800 / stone-150), `--secondary` (stone-100 / stone-700)
- `--muted` (stone-100 / stone-700), `--accent` (stone-150 / stone-600)
- `--brand` (panda-400, both modes), `--destructive` (chroma --danger, both modes)
- `--border`, `--input` (stone-200 / stone-600); `--input-bg` (stone-100 / stone-800) тАФ field surface for `Input`, `Textarea`, `SelectTrigger`, outline `Button`, `AttachmentInput` compact
- `--ring` (panda-400, both modes)
- `--chart-{1..5}` for data viz palettes
- Sidebar mirror tokens: `--sidebar-background`, `--sidebar-foreground`, `--sidebar-primary`, `--sidebar-accent`, `--sidebar-border`, `--sidebar-ring`

**Rule of thumb:** never pair `bg-X/10` with `text-X` on the same chroma тАФ use the matching `*-soft-fg` token. Reserve raw chroma tokens for non-text fills.

### Typography

Three font families, loaded by the consumer (Google Fonts `<link>` in `index.html`):

| Family | Token | Tailwind utility | Role |
|--------|-------|-------------------|------|
| Inter | `--font-sans` | `font-sans` (default) | Body, headings, labels тАФ every surface that isn't PageHeader or hero |
| Comfortaa | `--font-display` | `font-display` + `text-display-{sm,md,lg,xl}` | `PageHeader` title and hero/marketing surfaces ONLY |
| JetBrains Mono | `--font-mono` | `font-mono` + `text-mono-{sm,md}` | Code, IDs, copyable values, tabular numerics |

**Body scale (Inter)** тАФ token-driven; each utility carries its own line-height and weight:

| Utility | Size | Line-height | Weight | Notes |
|---------|------|-------------|--------|-------|
| `text-xs` | 11px | 1.5 | 600 | letter-spacing 0.04em тАФ eyebrows, badges, captions |
| `text-sm` | 13px | 1.5 | 500 | secondary body, labels, helper text |
| `text-base` | 14px | 1.55 | 400 | default body |
| `text-md` | 15px | 1.55 | 400 | slightly emphasized body |
| `text-lg` | 17px | 1.5 | 500 | section subheading |
| `text-xl` | 20px | 1.45 | 500 | Card / Dialog title |

**Display scale (Comfortaa)** тАФ hero/marketing only:

| Utility | Size | Line-height | Weight | Notes |
|---------|------|-------------|--------|-------|
| `text-display-sm` | 28px | 1.2 | 500 | `PageHeader` title size |
| `text-display-md` | 40px | 1.15 | 600 | hero subhead |
| `text-display-lg` | 56px | 1.1 | 600 | letter-spacing -0.01em |
| `text-display-xl` | 72px | 1.05 | 600 | letter-spacing -0.02em |

**Mono scale (JetBrains Mono):**

| Utility | Size | Line-height | Weight |
|---------|------|-------------|--------|
| `text-mono-sm` | 11px | 1.5 | 400 |
| `text-mono-md` | 13px | 1.5 | 400 |

**Heading font policy (strict)** тАФ see the existing "Heading Font Policy" subsection further down. Comfortaa is reserved for the `PageHeader` title (wired internally тАФ do not re-apply) and the `text-display-*` utilities. Do **not** add a global `h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-family: var(--font-display) }` rule; the package ships an explicit Inter reset and a downstream global rule defeats it.

### Tones

Shared semantic vocabulary used across `Badge` (variant), `MeterRow` (tone), `ProgressStatCard` items (tone), `StatCard` (deltaTone), and other tone-aware components. **Pick the tone by what the value means, not by what color you want.**

| Tone | Meaning | Badge variant | MeterRow tone | ProgressStatCard cell tone |
|------|---------|---------------|----------------|----------------------------|
| `success` | Live, approved, healthy, on track, paid | `success` | `success` | `success` |
| `warning` | Approaching a soft limit, needs attention, partial | `warning` | `warning` | `warning` |
| `info` | Informational, planning, not started, scheduled | `info` | `info` | `info` |
| `destructive` | Failed, rejected, cancelled, hard limit exceeded, overdue | `destructive` | `destructive` | `destructive` |
| `muted` | Archived, inactive, deprecated | `muted` | `muted` | `muted` |
| `default` / `secondary` | Generic / categorical / goal progress without good-bad meaning | `secondary` (categorical) or `default` (emphasis) | `default` | `default` |

In a breakdown chart of project status (Active / On Hold / Planning / Blocked), match each row's `MeterRow` tone to the corresponding `Badge` tone тАФ pair the same visual language.

`StatCard` `deltaTone` follows **desirability**, not arrow direction:
- Metric went up and that's good (revenue, active users) тЖТ `up`
- Metric went down and that's good (errors, churn, latency) тЖТ also `up` тАФ tone follows desirability
- Metric moved against goal тЖТ `down`
- No meaningful change (within noise) тЖТ `flat`

Stat cell tones in `ProgressStatCard` are graphical emphasis on a count (treated under WCAG SC 1.4.11 / 3:1, not 1.4.3 / 4.5:1). For AA-strict text, pair the cell with a `Badge` or icon and leave the cell tone at `default`.

For full per-component tone tables (incl. when to use `dot`), see [decision-guide.md](docs/decision-guide.md).

## Component Catalog

For full API docs, props, and code examples, read the linked doc file.

### Layout

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| AppShell | Data-driven app layout with collapsible sidebar, header, user menu | [app-shell.md](docs/app-shell.md) |
| PageHeader | Page title, description, and action buttons | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| DetailPage | Resource detail/show page layout with sidebar | [detail-page.md](docs/detail-page.md) |
| EmptyState | Centered empty state with icon, title, description, action | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| Modal | Form modal with sticky header/footer, size variants | [modal.md](docs/modal.md) |
| Stepper | Multi-step progress (horizontal or vertical); descriptions only on current step | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| Separator | Horizontal or vertical divider | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| Breadcrumb | Navigation breadcrumb trail | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |

### Forms

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Button | Variants, action presets, icon, tooltip, loading | [button.md](docs/button.md) |
| Input | Text input field | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| NumberInput | Controlled numeric input with min/max clamp, step-driven decimals, suffix, error state, arrow-key stepping | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| PasswordInput | Password field with a built-in show/hide eye toggle; forwards refs and accepts all native input props | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Label | Accessible form label | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Textarea | Multi-line text input | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Checkbox | Checkbox with label support | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| RadioGroup | Radio button group | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Switch | Toggle switch | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Select | Static dropdown (< 10 items) | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| SelectPicker | Searchable dropdown, single/multi select | [select-picker.md](docs/select-picker.md) |
| DatePicker | Single date picker | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| DateRangePicker | Date range picker with presets | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Slider | Range slider | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Form | react-hook-form integration with field context | [form.md](docs/form.md) |
| SearchInput | Debounced search input with clear button | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| SplitButton | Primary action + dropdown secondary actions | [split-button.md](docs/split-button.md) |
| AttachmentInput | File upload with dropzone/compact variants | [attachment-input.md](docs/attachment-input.md) |
| SelectableCard | Card-based single/multi selection | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| FilterBar | FilterButton trigger + ActiveFilters chips | [filter-bar.md](docs/filter-bar.md) |

### Data Display

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Card | Container with header, content, footer | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Table | Data table with header, body, footer | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Badge | Status indicator with semantic tones (default/secondary/destructive/outline/success/warning/info/muted) and optional dot | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Avatar | User/entity avatar with image and fallback; `<AvatarFallback>` auto-converts a full-name string to a 2-char monogram and is colorized by default (opt out via `colorize={false}`); supports `shape="circle"` (default) or `"square"` | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| AvatarGroup | Stack of overlapping Avatars with `max` overflow tile; inherits the Avatar shape | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Calendar | Date calendar | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Skeleton | Loading placeholder | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Progress | Progress bar | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| StatCard | Dashboard stat tile (Card + AnimatedNumber + Badge) with delta chip | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| MultiStatCard | Two or more related stat metrics inside one card with dividers between cells; horizontal or vertical orientation | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| ProgressStatCard | Card combining a titled headline, a Progress bar, and a row of tone-aware stat cells (cycle/pipeline/completion summaries) | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| MeterRow | Labeled horizontal bar with per-row tone (success/warning/info/destructive/muted) | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| ListRow | Avatar/icon + title + subtitle + trailing-meta row primitive; supports interactive `asButton` mode | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| CodeLabel | Inline monospace label with optional copy button (`copyable` prop) | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| AnimatedNumber | Animated number display with easing | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| ExpandableText | Collapsible long text with show more/less | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |

### Feedback

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Alert | Alert banner (default, destructive, info) | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| AlertDialog | Modal confirmation dialog | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| Sonner | Toast notifications | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| LoadingPage | Full-screen loading state | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| ConnectionBanner | Offline/connectivity warning banner | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| ErrorFallback | Error boundary fallback (root/route variants) | [error-fallback.md](docs/error-fallback.md) |
